prompt: Which courses have no enrollments at all?

inputData.question: Which courses have no enrollments at all?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Which courses have no enrollments at all?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Which courses have no enrollments at all?"},"startedAt":1771855961654,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"To find courses with no enrollments, I need to identify courses that have no associated enrollments. The relationship chain is: courses → course_sections → enrollments. A course has no enrollments if none of its sections have any enrollments. I'll use a LEFT JOIN from courses to course_sections to enrollments and filter for NULL enrollment records, then select distinct courses.","sql":"
SELECT DISTINCT
  c.id,
  c.code,
  c.name,
  c.credits
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
WHERE e.id IS NULL
ORDER BY c.code
","assumptions":["A course is considered to have no enrollments if none of its sections have any enrollments","The query includes all courses regardless of semester or academic year"]},"endedAt":1771855987409},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

WHERE e.id IS NULL
ORDER BY c.code

visualization.title: Courses with No Enrollments
visualization.description: List of courses that have no student enrollments

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  c.id,
  c.code,
  c.name,
  c.credits
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
WHERE e.id IS NULL
ORDER BY c.code
